title: Server Perfected
description: A pack that is made to fit your needs for almost every vanilla server you come across.
body:
![Server Perfected](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c586fb67f7bccfe5ee4bd0037af970833b09e97.gif)

Ever wanted a modpack that fit all your needs for a server? So you wouldnt always have to make another instance of Minecraft for almost every server you join? Well, you might have just found that modpack! This modpack aims to provide you with mods that fit every server you come across!


<details>
<summary>📥 Installation Guide (Modrinth Website)</summary>

- Press the download button
- Select the version you want
- Import into your perferred Minecraft Launcher (Modrinth App, Minecraft Launcher, etc...)

</details>

# Up to date
When a new Minecraft update rolls out, I try to update the modpack to the latest version! This modpack also has lots of different versions, so you could play Minecraft on 1.21, to the latest version! This is because some servers only allow you to play on a specific version.

# Performance
This modpack comes with a whole bunch of mods to improve performance on servers, so you can instantly join servers and not get interrupted by lag when you enter your chest room.

# Soft Foundation
This modpack uses the modloader Fabric, a lightweight mod loader that is compatible with tons of mods and has an awesome community!

# Optifine Features
Supports Optifine features such as shaders, connected textures, and zooming. If a resource pack says it needs Optifine installed, it should work with this modpack.

# Controller Support
This modpack comes with controller support! Thanks to [Controllify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) for making this possible!
